# viettelidc_ovpc_autoscale_groups (Data Source)

List all ViettelIDC Autoscale Groups in a VPC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "viettelidc_ovpc_autoscale_groups" "all" {
  vpc_id = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}

output "asg_names" {
  value = [for g in data.viettelidc_ovpc_autoscale_groups.all.autoscale_groups : g.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC filter; falls back to provider default.

### Read-Only

- `autoscale_groups` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--autoscale_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--autoscale_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `autoscale_groups`

Read-Only:

- `desired_capacity` (Number) Desired instance count.
- `has_load_balancer` (Boolean) Whether attached to a Load Balancer.
- `id` (String) Autoscale Group ID.
- `is_autoscale` (Boolean) Whether auto-scaling is enabled.
- `launch_template_id` (String) Launch Template ID.
- `max_size` (Number) Maximum instance count.
- `metric_type` (String) Scaling metric type.
- `min_size` (Number) Minimum instance count.
- `name` (String) Group name.
- `scale_in_threshold` (Number) Scale-in CPU % threshold.
- `scale_out_threshold` (Number) Scale-out CPU % threshold.
